cases.appeal_window: SIPCOT appeal against HC's interest-waiver order pending, no fixed window disclosed
cases.note: SIPCOT demanded Rs 12 lakh additional land cost plus 16.5% p.a. interest; HC waived interest, SIPCOT has appealed that waiver; matter pending

cases.case_ref: Tamil Nadu Sales Tax dispute (Pondicherry depot sales, 1989-91)
cases.forum: Tamil Nadu Sales Tax Appellate Tribunal
cases.parties: Tanfac Industries vs Tamil Nadu Sales Tax authorities
cases.note: Demand reduced to Rs 52.77 lakh by Appellate Asst Commissioner, paid under protest; company separately filed writ petition for refund; appeal before Tribunal filed 6 Jan 2017, proceeding awaited

cases.case_ref: Service tax, VAT and GST claims not acknowledged as debt
cases.note: Rs 13.81 lakh service tax/VAT + Rs 39.94 lakh GST claims outstanding as at 31 Mar 2025, not provided for
